examples: But they were looking over their shoulder at an insurgent: Neal Blue, CEO of General Atomics.
The Reaper, made by General Atomics, can cost $10m or more, depending on its bells and whistles.
General Atomics of San Diego has funded the pre-conceptual design, which is underway and scheduled for completion in August.
Global Hawk's smaller cousin is the Predator, made by a former General Dynamics unit, General Atomics Aeronautical Systems.
Predator drones are built by General Atomics Aeronautical Systems Inc. of San Diego.
